metadata.description: Kenzie Creative — a marketplace of small, focused plugins for staying on top of your world. Plugins share a directory-level convention (see /contract) so they compose without depending on each other.

plugins.name: intelligence-briefing
plugins.description: The external scan: a daily/weekly environmental brief that triages the outside world (news, industry, research, policy, science) into the few items worth your attention. Self-contained; writes a styled HTML brief and keeps its own ledger.

plugins.name: researcher
plugins.description: A structured research system: pick a topic, get a phased plan grounded in preliminary research, then work through it together — collecting sources, finding patterns, mapping gaps, synthesizing findings, and auditing every claim before it reaches output. Standalone.
